project.summary: A desktop-scale 6-axis robotic arm with a rotating base, shoulder, elbow, wrist, and two-finger gripper.

placeholders.title: LLM hardware manifest
placeholders.status: Real when API key is configured
placeholders.detail: The backend asks the configured LLM provider for a structured manifest: project summary, BOM rows, catalog-name aliases, and simple 3D primitives.

placeholders.title: 3D geometry
placeholders.detail: The viewer renders boxes, cylinders, and spheres from the manifest. Replace primitive arrays with Cadybara STEP/STL URLs when the CAD service is connected.

placeholders.title: Supplier search
placeholders.detail: Supplier cards use catalog-name suggestions to build searches. A later version can call Octopart, Digi-Key, or distributor APIs for live pricing and stock.

placeholders.title: Pricing
placeholders.detail: The schema has room for cost fields, but this demo intentionally avoids fake prices until a supplier API is wired in.

parts.name: Custom base plate
parts.description: Mounting foundation with bolt pattern for the rotating base.

parts.name: Slew bearing
parts.description: Large bearing that supports the vertical base rotation axis.

parts.name: J1 base actuator
parts.description: Primary yaw actuator for the arm base.

parts.name: Custom shoulder yoke
parts.description: Forked bracket holding the shoulder joint bearings and actuator.

parts.name: J2 shoulder actuator
parts.description: Raises and lowers the upper arm link.

parts.name: Custom upper arm link
parts.description: Lightweight structural member between shoulder and elbow.

parts.name: Custom elbow hub
parts.description: Machined joint block connecting upper arm to forearm.

parts.name: Custom forearm link
parts.description: Second arm segment carrying wrist loads.

parts.name: Custom wrist housing
parts.description: Compact housing for the three wrist degrees of freedom.

parts.name: J4 wrist roll actuator
parts.description: Rotates the tool flange around the forearm axis.

parts.name: J5 wrist pitch actuator
parts.description: Tilts the end effector up and down.

parts.name: Custom tool flange
parts.description: Universal wrist output plate for end effectors.

parts.name: Two-finger gripper kit
parts.description: Demo end effector for picking small objects.

parts.name: Radial joint bearings
parts.description: Support bearings for shoulder, elbow, and wrist shafts.

parts.name: Precision shaft set
parts.description: Joint shafts and wrist axle stock.

parts.name: Metric fastener kit
catalogNameSuggestions: metric socket head cap screw assortment

plan.lead: Treat this as a custom fabricated part until a real CAD generator decides whether it is best machined, printed, or cut from plate.

sources.name: Xometry
sources.note: Upload generated STEP/STL and request the closest manufacturing route.

sources.name: Protolabs
sources.note: Fast path for machined or printed prototypes.

sources.name: Fictiv
sources.note: Good option when tolerance review matters.

sources.name: SendCutSend
sources.note: Useful if the part can be flattened into a plate profile.

plan.lead: Bearings are standard catalog parts; confirm bore, OD, width, seal type, and load rating.

sources.name: McMaster-Carr
sources.note: Search standard bearings and compare dimensional tables.

sources.name: MISUMI
sources.note: Good for metric bearing variants and CAD downloads.

sources.name: Digi-Key
sources.note: Useful for small bearing and robotics inventory checks.

plan.lead: Select by torque, speed, voltage, backlash, mounting pattern, and control interface.

sources.note: Search servos, gearmotors, brackets, and hub hardware.

sources.name: Pololu
sources.note: Good for motors, drivers, and compact gearmotor options.

sources.name: RobotShop
sources.note: Broad marketplace for actuators and robot components.

sources.name: Digi-Key
sources.note: Useful when the actuator needs datasheets and stock checks.
